---
name: Skill request
about: Request a new Airaa skill
title: "[SKILL] "
labels: skill-request
assignees: ''
---

**What should this skill help with?**
A clear description of the task or workflow this skill should automate.

**Who uses it?**
- [ ] Brand running campaigns
- [ ] Creator on Airaa
- [ ] Agency / team

**Which Airaa feature does it relate to?**
e.g. UGC campaigns, Clipping, Instant Tasks, Aura Board, Guild, Analytics

**Example trigger phrases**
What would you say to Claude to invoke this skill?
- "..."
- "..."

**Anything else?**
Links, context, or reference briefs that would help build it.
